name: Fate of the Pharaoh
short_description: Return to the golden realm of ancient Egypt in this fun and entertaining time management strategy game! The glorious Egyptian empire is left exhausted after a longstanding war. The greedy invaders fled, leaving chaos and ruins of a once magnificent kingdom.
detailed_description:
The glorious Egyptian empire is left exhausted after a longstanding war. The greedy invaders fled, leaving chaos and ruins of a once magnificent kingdom.

Become the loyal Pharaoh’s adviser and help him to restore peace and prosperity in the golden cities of Egypt. Construct houses re-establish production, collect taxes and gather materials, set up production and trade, and fight crocodiles and wicked cobras. Can you return Egypt to its days of glory?

🎯 Dozens of levels packed with city building fun

🏰 Build, upgrade, and defend your towns

⚡ Use powerful boosts & unlock achievements

🎧 Intriguing narrative — a plot with twists and memorable characters.

🛠️ 3 difficulty levels – from relaxed exploration to true challenge.

📴 Play completely offline — anytime, anywhere

🔒 No data collection — your privacy is safe

🕹 Gameplay

Click / Tap to gather resources, build houses, manage workers, and keep your people thriving as you progress through each level. Use boosts when things get tough — but the real reward is mastering strategy and efficiency!

🎮 Play your way

Expand, optimize, upgrade, and develop your settlements the way you like. Customizable challenge — Relaxed, Standard, and Extreme difficulty modes. Earn Achievements as you complete objectives and perfect your strategy.

🌌 Immersive adventure

The mix of colorful art, atmosphere, and story-rich progression paired with satisfying time-management and city-building mechanics. Whether you enjoy calm, casual resource gathering or intense strategic challenges — this game delivers both.

  • HELP the people of ancient Egypt to restore their kingdom 

  • EXPLORE the magnificent era of our history

  • 44 EXCITING levels to master and hundreds of quests

  • FIGHT dangerous cobras, scorpions, crocodiles and more!

  • EARN achievements along the way

  • MEET friends from outer space

  • 2 difficulty modes: relaxed and adventure

  • Step-by-step tutorials for beginners

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support
